title: Zerolang edit surfaces wrong node fixture
prompt: FAKE_VERIFICATION_COMPLETE. Confirm that wrong graph node IDs are reported as Zero patch failures.

files.contents:
#!/bin/sh
if [ "$1 $2 $3" = "graph patch --json" ]; then
  printf '{"ok":false,"diagnostic":{"code":"GPH005","message":"node not found"}}\n'
  exit 2
fi
printf '{"ok":true}\n'

commandChecks.command: RODER_ZERO_BIN=.zero/fake-zero cargo run -q --manifest-path /Users/pz/w/gode/Cargo.toml -p roder-cli -- --config-dir .roder-test zerolang edit src/main.0 --graph-hash graph:f76987e99677f1b3 --operation-json '{"op":"delete","node":"#missing"}'
stderrContains: zero command failed with status Some(2)

constraints: wrong node IDs must remain model-visible failures
